subject: Mozi Minute: Wealth Alchemy (w/ Video)
body:
Words I like: Most people optimize for income. The wealthy optimize for enterprise value.

Mozi Minute: Wealth Alchemy

Want to know how entrepreneurs become billionaires in a decade? (Bonus video below).

Two arbitrage plays that change everything.

- First: LTV to CAC.
- Second: CAC to Enterprise Value.

Once I understood the math, it changed how I did everything.

Here's how it works:

If you spend $10 to get a customer (CAC) who makes you $30 in annual EBITDA, and your company trades at 10x EBITDA, something magical happens.

That $10 spend instantly adds $300 to your company's value.

Think about that...

You're not making 2x or 3x your money. You're making 30x. Tax free.

But it gets better. You now have two choices with that $30 annual profit:

1) Take it out, pay taxes, keep $20

2) Reinvest it, get 3 more customers, add $900 to your company value (and by extension, you net worth…and here's the best part…tax free).

This is why the ultra-wealthy seem to get rich so fast.

They're not getting 10% annual returns.

They're getting 30x on every marketing dollar, then reinvesting every dollar of profit for another 30x.

Add zeros as desired to the prices I used, but the fundamentals remain.

But this only works once you have a company that checks the boxes of what makes a company sellable.

As promised, value in under a minute.

Happy hunting,

Alex
